skill.name: code-review-error-handling
skill.description: Error-handling and resilience review lens for catching swallowed failures, unbounded I/O, missing timeouts, retry hazards, and partial-failure bugs during code review.
skill.author: Agent Skills Team

name: code-review-error-handling
description: Resilience-focused review lens for signalling, propagation, retries, cleanup, and observable failure behavior.

categories.name: Error Signalling Discipline
categories.description: Ignored return codes, unchecked fallible operations, and silent partial-success paths

categories.name: Exception & Error Hygiene
categories.description: Overbroad catches, swallowed errors, and lost causal context

categories.name: Timeout & Cancellation Discipline
categories.description: Explicit timeouts, cancellation propagation, and bounded waits

categories.name: Retry Semantics
categories.description: Max attempts, backoff, idempotency, and retryable error classes

categories.name: Partial-Failure Handling
categories.description: Batch safety, compensation, and caller-visible partial-success contracts

categories.name: Error-Context Observability
categories.description: Logs, trackers, correlation IDs, and actionable context

categories.name: Resource Cleanup on Error Paths
categories.description: Scoped release patterns for files, locks, sockets, and transactions

categories.name: Defensive-Programming Overreach
categories.description: Unnecessary guards and catches that add noise without resilience value
